name: Parmesan Herb Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F.
2. Grease 12 muffin pan cups or line with paper baking cups.
3. Sift flour into a bowl and mix with sugar, baking powder, baking soda, crumbled sage, chopped parsley, and grated Parmesan cheese until well combined.
4. Add butter/sour milk (or melted butter/margarine) and egg; stir just until dry ingredients are moistened.
5. Fill prepared muffin cups 2/3 full with batter.
6. Bake at 400°F for 15 to 20 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.
7. Serve hot.
MICROWAVE DIRECTIONS:
1. Prepare muffin batter as directed above.
2. Using a microwave-safe 6-cup muffin pan, line each cup with two paper baking cups to absorb moisture during baking.
3. Fill lined cups about half full with batter.
4. Sprinkle the top of each muffin with cornflakes crumbs.
5. Microwave on HIGH for 2½ to 3 minutes, rotating the pan halfway through cooking, until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.
6. Remove muffins from the pan and discard outer paper baking cups.
7. Cool 1 minute on a wire rack before serving. Repeat with remaining batter.
